skills.name: check
skills.description: Run quality checks: validation, code review, smoke tests, preflight, or harness health.
skills.argument_hint: <validate | review | smoke | preflight | health | test-plan | docs | freshness | telemetry | semiotic-inspection> [--depth <light|standard|deep>] [--source <path>] [scope]

skills.name: communicate
skills.description: Generate tailored communication material for a specific audience segment.

skills.name: design
skills.description: Define or update project design — stack, conventions, domain model, conceptual design, and standards. Use when user mentions 'design', 'design project', 'configure project', 'update design', or 'project setup'.

skills.name: document
skills.description: Generate or update project documentation based on plan Docs: fields, auto-detection, or explicit type selection.

skills.name: explain
skills.description: Explains behavior, code, data model, architecture, or spec drift with visual diagrams and analogies.

skills.name: help
skills.description: Show contextual help, browse skills by category, or get details on a specific skill.

skills.name: implement
skills.description: Execute a previously generated plan to add a feature, fix a bug, or refactor code. Use when user mentions "implement", "execute plan", or "run plan".

skills.name: onboard
skills.description: Generate a tailored onboarding plan for a new team member based on their role and expertise level.

skills.name: pending
skills.description: List and address outstanding human actions from the pending ledger: verify implementations, flip status markers, run periodic curation, manage deferred work.

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Make a plan to add a feature, fix a bug, or refactor code. Supports metacomm framing for design-intent briefs.

skills.name: publish
skills.description: Publish a tagged release to the public SEJA repository via the automated publish pipeline.

skills.name: qa-log
skills.description: Log the entire current Q&A session into a file for future reference.

skills.name: reflect
skills.description: On-demand reflection anchored on specific plans, research reports, or other artifacts. I summarize the artifacts you choose, ask what stands out, and record your reflection.

skills.name: research
skills.description: Answer questions about the codebase, architecture, or design decisions, logging Q&A pairs. With --inventory, catalog codebase elements matching a pattern.

skills.name: seja-setup
skills.description: Manage the SEJA harness in this project: install into a new or existing codebase, finalise an in-place download, create a companion workspace, bootstrap a demo project, or upgrade harness files to the latest release. State-driven dispatch routes each invocation to the right action, preserving project-specific configuration.
